subcodes.first_line: Immeasurable praise beseemeth that peerless Essence Who hath caused the Sun of Unity to appear from the horizon of detachment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش بیقیاس ذات بی مثالیرا سزاست که شمس توحید را از افق تجرید ظاهر فرمود و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for teaching, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
